workflow-instructions.name: venture-status
workflow-instructions.overview: Read the venture state and produce a structured dashboard showing: current position in the 12-week incubation, category progress, guiding questions answered vs. pending, completed artifacts, and recommended next actions. This workflow reads state only — it does not modify anything.

step.name: produce-dashboard
step.title: Produce Status Dashboard
step.instructions:
Produce a structured, readable dashboard in this format:
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ 🚀 VENTURE STATUS DASHBOARD ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
Venture: {venture_name} Current Phase: {current_phase} ({phase name}) Current Week: {current_week} / 12 Entry Point: {entry_point} Status: {status} Pivot Count: {pivot_count} Started: {started}
─────────────────────────────────────────────────── CATEGORY PROGRESS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── 🧑‍💼 Team: {category_progress.team} 🔭 Venture: {category_progress.venture} 🏢 Mothership: {category_progress.mothership}
─────────────────────────────────────────────────── GUIDING QUESTIONS ANSWERED ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── For each phase, list: ✅ Answered | ⏳ Pending | ❌ Not started Format: Phase 1 - Setup Team: ✅ What is the venture's reason to exist? (evidence: venture-canvas.md) ✅ Who is in the team? (evidence: team-charter.md) ⏳ Does the team understand mothership capabilities?
Phase 2 - Understand Domain: [list questions with status]
Phase 3 - Find Pain: [list questions with status]
Phase 4 - Define Solution: [list questions with status]
Phase 5 - Business Case: [list questions with status]
Phase 6 - Design Business: [list questions with status]
─────────────────────────────────────────────────── COMPLETED ARTIFACTS ({count} total) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── List all completed artifacts with their file paths
─────────────────────────────────────────────────── GATE HISTORY ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── Check-in Gate: {date} | Decision: {decision} | Score: {score} Final Gate: {date} | Decision: {decision} | Score: {score}
─────────────────────────────────────────────────── PIVOT HISTORY ({pivot_count} pivots) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── [List any pivots with: date, type, reason, re-entry phase]
─────────────────────────────────────────────────── RECOMMENDED NEXT ACTIONS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── Based on current_phase and unanswered guiding questions: 1. [Most urgent action — what must happen next to progress] 2. [Second priority] 3. [Third priority]
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
Calibrate recommendations based on current_phase and what guiding questions remain unanswered.
